Architecture.title: Scalable Architecture
Architecture.subtitle: Microservices-based, horizontally scalable architecture designed for high availability and performance
Architecture.elasticScaleDesc: Built for Kubernetes, auto-scaling, and multi-region deployment
Architecture.microservicesDesc: Independent, scalable services with API-first approach

PlatformHighlights.title: Built for massive scale.
PlatformHighlights.subtitle: Comprehensive architecture designed to power the future of digital banking globally.
PlatformHighlights.dashboardDesc: Comprehensive unified dashboard with real-time analytics, transaction monitoring, and customizable widgets for complete oversight.
PlatformHighlights.architectureDesc: Microservices-based scalable architecture with resilient design, API-first approach, and seamless third-party integrations.
PlatformHighlights.capabilitiesDesc: Multi-channel banking, instant payments, wealth management, loan origination, and real-time financial insights.
PlatformHighlights.devAndImplDesc: Agile development methodology, CI/CD pipelines, automated testing, and comprehensive API documentation for rapid deployment.
PlatformHighlights.operationsMaintDesc: 24/7 monitoring, automated scaling, proactive maintenance, incident management, and comprehensive logging systems.
PlatformHighlights.techStackDesc: Modern tech stack including React, Node.js, Kubernetes, PostgreSQL, Redis, Kafka, and enterprise-grade security frameworks.

SmartCards.description: Empower your customers with intelligent card programs. Issue physical, virtual, and single-use cards instantly with programmable spending limits and real-time fraud prevention built into the core.
SmartCards.virtualPhysicalDesc: Instantly issue secure virtual cards for immediate use, while physical metal cards are shipped seamlessly to your corporate clients.
SmartCards.expenseControlsDesc: Set granular spending limits, merchant category restrictions, and multi-currency budgets directly through the API.
SmartCards.appleGooglePayDesc: Native integration with digital wallets. Customers can provision their cards directly from your banking app.

video-kyc.title: Video KYC
video-kyc.subtitle: Secure remote verification using real-time video calls, document scanning, and biometric identity checks.

features.title: Biometric Verification
features.description: Automated verification signals for faster review and decisioning.

features.title: Live Video Banking
features.description: Connect with bank officials via secure video call.

features.title: Secure Digital Onboarding
features.description: Multi-layer checks to validate identity and reduce fraud risk.

features.title: Document Scanning
features.description: Capture and verify documents in real time with guided capture.

sections.title: Capabilities
content: Encrypted Sessions: Transport-layer security for live verification sessions.
Fraud Signals: Heuristics and checks to detect suspicious patterns.
Agent Review: Human-in-the-loop review with guided evidence capture.
Tokenized Access: Secure access for verification steps and admin operations.
Session Timelines: Track capture and review stages with clear milestones.
Exportable Evidence: Generate reports and share proof-of-verification artifacts.

kiosk-banking.description: A guided, secure self-service experience designed for fast and convenient branch transactions. 70% faster than traditional teller service, handling 200+ transactions per day.

two-factor-auth.title: Two-Factor Authentication
two-factor-auth.subtitle: Advanced multi-factor authentication solution protecting against account takeovers and fraud.
two-factor-auth.description: Enterprise security layer protecting against unauthorized access with biometric and PIN-based security. Digital banking is expected to hit $395 billion by 2026. Don't let fraudsters exploit your processes.

features.title: Biometric Authentication
features.description: Secure login using FaceID or Fingerprint recognition.

features.title: Liveness Detection
features.description: Advanced liveness detection to prevent spoofing.

features.title: PIN Authentication
features.description: Secure 4-6 digit PIN for quick access with auto-lock.

features.title: Real-Time Notifications
features.description: Instantly approve or reject transactions directly from push notifications.

sections.title: Authentication Dashboard
content: Comprehensive dashboard for managing authentication requests.
Complete user profile and account details.
Pending Actions: Transactions awaiting approval or rejection.
Completed Actions: History of approved and rejected transactions.
Notification Requests: Real-time transaction approval notifications.

ParticleMeshSection.description: Our distributed platform processes millions of transactions across continents with sub-millisecond latency. Built for banks that demand absolute reliability at scale.

TechShowcase3D.description: Our platform core is a refractive, self-healing mesh — just like this glass structure, it bends around obstacles, distributes load organically, and never breaks.
